15	// trim whitespace from the beginning and end of a string
16	static std::string trim(const std::string & str) {
17	    size_t start = 0;
18	    size_t end = str.size();
19	    while (start < end && isspace(static_cast<unsigned char>(str[start]))) {
20	        start += 1;
21	    }
22	    while (end > start && isspace(static_cast<unsigned char>(str[end - 1]))) {
23	        end -= 1;
24	    }
25	    return str.substr(start, end - start);
26	}

83	llm_chat_template llm_chat_template_from_str(const std::string & name) {
84	    return LLM_CHAT_TEMPLATES.at(name);
85	}
86	
87	llm_chat_template llm_chat_detect_template(const std::string & tmpl) {
88	    try {
89	        return llm_chat_template_from_str(tmpl);
90	    } catch (const std::out_of_range &) {
91	        // ignore
92	    }
93	
94	    auto tmpl_contains = [&tmpl](const char * haystack) -> bool {
95	        return tmpl.find(haystack) != std::string::npos;
96	    };
97	    if (tmpl_contains("<|im_start|>")) {
98	        return tmpl_contains("<|im_sep|>")
99	            ? LLM_CHAT_TEMPLATE_PHI_4
100	            : tmpl_contains("<end_of_utterance>")
101	                ? LLM_CHAT_TEMPLATE_SMOLVLM // SmolVLM uses <|im_start|> as BOS, but it is NOT chatml
102	                : LLM_CHAT_TEMPLATE_CHATML;
103	    } else if (tmpl.find("mistral") == 0 || tmpl_contains("[INST]")) {
104	        if (tmpl_contains("[SYSTEM_PROMPT]")) {
105	            return LLM_CHAT_TEMPLATE_MISTRAL_V7;
106	        } else if (
107	            // catches official 'v1' template
108	            tmpl_contains("' [INST] ' + system_message")
109	            // catches official 'v3' and 'v3-tekken' templates
110	            || tmpl_contains("[AVAILABLE_TOOLS]")
111	        ) {
112	            // Official mistral 'v1', 'v3' and 'v3-tekken' templates
113	            // See: https://github.com/mistralai/cookbook/blob/main/concept-deep-dive/tokenization/chat_templates.md
114	            // See: https://github.com/mistralai/cookbook/blob/main/concept-deep-dive/tokenization/templates.md
115	            if (tmpl_contains(" [INST]")) {
116	                return LLM_CHAT_TEMPLATE_MISTRAL_V1;
117	            } else if (tmpl_contains("\"[INST]\"")) {
118	                return LLM_CHAT_TEMPLATE_MISTRAL_V3_TEKKEN;
119	            }
120	            return LLM_CHAT_TEMPLATE_MISTRAL_V3;
